description: WalletRadar Protocol Registry — contract address to DeFi protocol classification mapping

0x1f98431c8ad98523631ae4a59f267346ea31f9.name: Uniswap V3 Factory
0x1f98431c8ad98523631ae4a59f267346ea31f9.notes: Factory deploys pools; LP_MINT/LP_BURN on pool contracts, not factory

0xc36442b4a4522e871399cd717abdd847ab11fe.name: Uniswap V3 NonfungiblePositionManager
0xc36442b4a4522e871399cd717abdd847ab11fe.notes: Mint/Burn/Collect on this contract = LP position management

0x0dc8e47a1196bcb590485ee8bf832c5c68a52f.name: SushiSwap RouteProcessor3 (Katana)
0x0dc8e47a1196bcb590485ee8bf832c5c68a52f.notes: Canonical SushiSwap V3 router on Katana. Same bytecode as Arbitrum/Base deployments via CREATE2. Verify on katanascan.com

0xba12222222228d8ba445958a75a0704d566bf2.name: Balancer Vault
0xba12222222228d8ba445958a75a0704d566bf2.notes: Single vault for all Balancer V2 pools. Also handles LP_MINT/LP_BURN via joinPool/exitPool

0x46a15b0b27311cedf172ab29e4f4766fbe7f43.name: PancakeSwap V3 Nonfungible Position Manager
0x46a15b0b27311cedf172ab29e4f4766fbe7f43.notes: V3 LP position NFT manager on Arbitrum and Base. Handles mint/increase/decrease/collect and LP NFT transfers into farming contracts.

0x55f4c8aba71a1e923edc303eb4feff14608cc2.name: Pancake Infinity CLPositionManager
0x55f4c8aba71a1e923edc303eb4feff14608cc2.notes: BSC concentrated-liquidity position manager. multicall(bytes[]) and modifyLiquidities(bytes,uint256) must be resolved from canonical raw legs/log-backed evidence.

0x4529a01c7a0410167c5740c487a8de60232617.name: Unichain Position Manager
0x4529a01c7a0410167c5740c487a8de60232617.notes: Method-aware concentrated-liquidity position manager. modifyLiquidities must be decoded from resulting actions/legs.

0x5e09acf80c0296740ec5d6f643005a4ef8daa6.name: PancakeSwap V3 MasterChef
0x5e09acf80c0296740ec5d6f643005a4ef8daa6.notes: Liquidity-mining custody contract for PancakeSwap V3 LP position NFTs on Arbitrum. Used to identify LP_POSITION_STAKE/UNSTAKE and staked-position liquidity changes.

0xc6a2db661d5a5690172d8eb0a7dea2d3008665.name: PancakeSwap V3 MasterChef
0xc6a2db661d5a5690172d8eb0a7dea2d3008665.notes: Liquidity-mining custody contract for PancakeSwap V3 LP position NFTs on Base. Handles staked-position liquidity changes and withdraw flows.

0x416b433906b1b72fa758e166e239c43d68dc6f.name: Velodrome Slipstream Position Manager
0x416b433906b1b72fa758e166e239c43d68dc6f.notes: Optimism concentrated-liquidity position manager. Supports direct mint, multicall collect/decrease flows, and LP NFT custody transfers.

0x0f5212f63ba8eab0fabd94fc2071d461d9d6dd.name: Velodrome Slipstream Staking Contract
0x0f5212f63ba8eab0fabd94fc2071d461d9d6dd.notes: LP-position custody contract on Optimism. Pure deposit(uint256)/withdraw(uint256) calls represent LP position stake/unstake, while reward-bearing paths remain method-aware.

0xc762d18800b3f78ae56e9e61ad7be98a413d59.name: Velodrome Slipstream Staking Contract
0xc762d18800b3f78ae56e9e61ad7be98a413d59.notes: LP-position custody contract on Optimism. Pure deposit(uint256)/withdraw(uint256) calls represent LP position stake/unstake, while reward-bearing paths remain method-aware.

0xbc6043a5e50ba0c0213d2f7430a73e4590af97.name: Velodrome Slipstream Staking Contract
0xbc6043a5e50ba0c0213d2f7430a73e4590af97.notes: LP-position custody contract on Optimism. Pure deposit(uint256)/withdraw(uint256) calls represent LP position stake/unstake, while reward-bearing paths remain method-aware.

0x7816f1711828c52eb3ca5a2f075a0c06e0548b.name: SmartChefInitializable
0x7816f1711828c52eb3ca5a2f075a0c06e0548b.notes: deposit(uint256) remains STAKING_DEPOSIT even when the same tx also claims/distributes rewards.

0xdaee41e335322c85ff2c5a6745c98e1351806e.name: PancakeSwap Universal Router
0xdaee41e335322c85ff2c5a6745c98e1351806e.notes: Universal router on zkSync Era. Uses method-aware dispatch for execute(bytes,bytes[],uint256) overloads.

0x1231deb6f5749ef6ce6943a275a1d3e7486f4e.name: LI.FI Diamond
0x1231deb6f5749ef6ce6943a275a1d3e7486f4e.notes: Method-aware bridge entry router. swapAndStartBridgeTokensViaMayan(...) is BRIDGE_OUT when canonical raw shows bridge-entry semantics.

0x794a61358d6845594f94dc1db02a252b5b4814.name: Aave V3 Pool
0x794a61358d6845594f94dc1db02a252b5b4814.notes: Same proxy address deployed across multiple chains

0xbbbbbbbbbb9cc5e90e3b3af64bdaf62c37eeff.name: MorphoBlue (Katana)
0xbbbbbbbbbb9cc5e90e3b3af64bdaf62c37eeff.notes: MorphoBlue uses same deterministic address (CREATE2) across all chains including Katana (chainId 747474). Confirmed in morpho-blue-api-metadata repo which lists chainId 747474.

0x1fa4431bc113d308bee1d46b0e98cb805fb48c.name: Morpho Bundler3
0x1fa4431bc113d308bee1d46b0e98cb805fb48c.notes: Method-aware bundler for Morpho vault/lending flows on Arbitrum. Do not classify from generic multicall keywords.

0xae7ab96520de3a18e5e111b5eaab095312d7fe.name: Lido stETH
0xae7ab96520de3a18e5e111b5eaab095312d7fe.notes: submit() = STAKING_DEPOSIT; rebasing token — balance increases over time

0x7f39c581f595b53c5cb19bd0b3f8da6c935e2c.name: Lido wstETH
0x7f39c581f595b53c5cb19bd0b3f8da6c935e2c.notes: wrap/unwrap stETH <> wstETH; non-rebasing wrapper; same cost basis chain

0xae78736cd615f374d3085123a210448e74fc63.name: Rocket Pool rETH
0xae78736cd615f374d3085123a210448e74fc63.notes: rETH is yield-bearing derivative; exchange rate changes over time

0xac3e018457b222d93114458476f3e3416abbe3.name: Frax sfrxETH
0xac3e018457b222d93114458476f3e3416abbe3.notes: ERC4626 vault; deposit frxETH get sfrxETH

0xf403c135812408bfbe8713b5a23a04b3d48aae.name: Convex Booster
0xf403c135812408bfbe8713b5a23a04b3d48aae.notes: deposit/withdraw Curve LP tokens for boosted CRV rewards

0x50c1a2ea0a861a967d9d0ffe2ae4012c2e0538.name: Yearn Vault (generic)
0x50c1a2ea0a861a967d9d0ffe2ae4012c2e0538.notes: Many Yearn vault addresses; this is a common one. Use ERC4626 interface detection

0x453d4ba9a2d594314df88564248497f7d74d6b.name: Beefy Vault (generic)
0x453d4ba9a2d594314df88564248497f7d74d6b.notes: Many Beefy vault addresses. Detect via ERC4626 + Beefy factory

0x2df1c51e09aecf9cacb7bc98cb1742757f163d.name: Hyperliquid Bridge2
0x2df1c51e09aecf9cacb7bc98cb1742757f163d.notes: USDC deposit to Hyperliquid L1. Withdrawal handled by validators, no L2 tx. NetWorth ~$3.8B

0x8315177ab297ba92a06054ce80a67ed4dbd7ed.name: Arbitrum Bridge (Inbox)
0x8315177ab297ba92a06054ce80a67ed4dbd7ed.notes: ETH/token deposits from Ethereum to Arbitrum One. On Arbitrum side: funds arrive at wallet

0x5288c571fd7ad117bea99bf60fe0846c4e84f9.name: Arbitrum L2 Gateway Router
0x5288c571fd7ad117bea99bf60fe0846c4e84f9.notes: Withdrawal from Arbitrum to Ethereum. Funds arrive on L1 after 7-day challenge period

0x42000000000000000000000000000000000000.name: L2StandardBridge (Katana → Ethereum)
0x42000000000000000000000000000000000000.notes: OP Stack predeploy. Withdrawal from Katana to Ethereum via AggLayer / Polygon CDK bridge.

0x42000000000000000000000000000000000000.name: L2CrossDomainMessenger (OP Stack)
0x42000000000000000000000000000000000000.notes: Predeploy; message passing. Usually paired with L2StandardBridge

0x32400084c286cf3e17e7b677ea9583e60a0003.name: zkSync Era L1 Diamond Proxy
0x32400084c286cf3e17e7b677ea9583e60a0003.notes: Main L1 entry for zkSync Era. Handles ETH and ERC-20 deposits

0x5c7bcd6e7de5423a257d81b442095a1a6ced35.name: Across SpokePool
0x5c7bcd6e7de5423a257d81b442095a1a6ced35.notes: deposit() = BRIDGE_OUT; fillRelay() = BRIDGE_IN for relayer. Speed: ~2min

0x341e94069f53234fe6dabef707ad4248305257.name: LI.FI Diamond
0x341e94069f53234fe6dabef707ad4248305257.notes: LI.FI bridge entry on zkSync Era. Uses method-aware dispatch for execute-style bridge calldata.

0x33ceb27b39d2bb7d2e61f7564d3df293440204.name: Hop AMM Wrapper (ARB)
0x33ceb27b39d2bb7d2e61f7564d3df293440204.notes: L2 swap + bridge via Hop AMM

0xbd3fa81b58ba92a82136038b25adec7066af31.name: Circle CCTP TokenMessenger
0xbd3fa81b58ba92a82136038b25adec7066af31.notes: Native USDC cross-chain burn/mint via Circle CCTP

0xc02aaa39b223fe8d0a0e5c4f27ead9083c756c.name: WETH
0xc02aaa39b223fe8d0a0e5c4f27ead9083c756c.notes: ETH↔WETH are equivalent for cost basis purposes; no new basis event on wrap/unwrap

0x42000000000000000000000000000000000000.name: WETH (Katana OP Stack predeploy)
0x42000000000000000000000000000000000000.notes: Standard OP Stack predeploy at 0x4200...0006. ETH↔WETH preserve cost basis.

0x489ee077994b6658eafa855c308275ead8097c.name: GMX V1 Vault
0x489ee077994b6658eafa855c308275ead8097c.notes: V1 core vault: swap/increase/decrease position. Swap events = SWAP; increasePosition = PROTOCOL_CUSTODY_DEPOSIT (perp open); decreasePosition = PROTOCOL_CUSTODY_WITHDRAW (perp close/reduce)

0xabbc5f99639c9b6bcb58544ddf04efa6802f40.name: GMX V1 Router
0xabbc5f99639c9b6bcb58544ddf04efa6802f40.notes: V1 router: swap + position management entrypoint

0x09f77e8a13de9a35a7231028187e9fd5db8a2a.name: GMX V1 OrderBook
0x09f77e8a13de9a35a7231028187e9fd5db8a2a.notes: Limit orders; createIncreaseOrder/createDecreaseOrder = deferred position intent

0x7c68c7866a64fa2160f78eeae12217ffbf871f.name: GMX V2 ExchangeRouter (v2.0)
0x7c68c7866a64fa2160f78eeae12217ffbf871f.notes: Original V2 router. createOrder=perp position; createDeposit=LP_MINT (GM pool); createWithdrawal=LP_BURN

0x602b805eedddbbd9ddff44a7dcbd46cb078496.name: GMX V2 ExchangeRouter (v2.1)
0x602b805eedddbbd9ddff44a7dcbd46cb078496.notes: V2.1 router; same semantics as v2.0

0x87d66368cd08a7ca42252f5ab44b2fb6d1fb8d.name: GMX V2 ExchangeRouter (latest)
0x87d66368cd08a7ca42252f5ab44b2fb6d1fb8d.notes: Current mainnet router as of late 2025

0x31ef83a530fde1b38ee9a18093a333d8bbbc40.name: GMX V2 OrderVault
0x31ef83a530fde1b38ee9a18093a333d8bbbc40.notes: Collateral is transferred to OrderVault before ExchangeRouter.createOrder; token flow here = collateral lock

0x9ab2de34a33fb459b538c43f251eb825645e85.name: GMX V1 Vault
0x9ab2de34a33fb459b538c43f251eb825645e85.notes: GMX V1 vault on Avalanche. Same semantics as Arbitrum V1 vault

0x82147c5a7e850ea4e28155df107f2590fd4ba3.name: GMX V1 RewardRouter (old)
0x82147c5a7e850ea4e28155df107f2590fd4ba3.notes: Legacy reward router; superseded by V2 above

0x3ef3d8ba38ebe18db133cec108f4d14ce00dd9.name: Angle Protocol: Distributor
0x3ef3d8ba38ebe18db133cec108f4d14ce00dd9.notes: Morpho / Angle reward-distribution contract. claim(...) is reward claim, not plain inbound.

0x94312a608246cecfce6811db84b3ef4b261905.name: FLUID Rewards Distributor
0x94312a608246cecfce6811db84b3ef4b261905.notes: Claim distributor. claim(address recipient_,...) must remain REWARD_CLAIM when raw legs show inbound reward movement.

0x70f61901658aafb7ae57da0c30695ce4417e72.name: Pendle Rewards Distributor
0x70f61901658aafb7ae57da0c30695ce4417e72.notes: claimRewards(uint256[] _pids) reward-distribution path. Must not fall back to plain inbound.

0x0045601c3c4c561012c108ea84a81e36eac242.name: Mantle Merkle Distributor
0x0045601c3c4c561012c108ea84a81e36eac242.notes: claim(uint256,uint256,address,uint256,bytes32[]) on DistributeMerkleNativeUpgradeable proxy. No-movement claim rows must stay explicit CLAIM_WITHOUT_MOVEMENT.

0x6f7d514bbd4aff3bcd1140b7344b32f063dee4.name: Compound Rewards
0x6f7d514bbd4aff3bcd1140b7344b32f063dee4.notes: claim(address comet,address src,bool shouldAccrue) on Unichain reward distributor.

0x5810c486c231803578d0ae7b3de97991784be1.name: BSC Reward Distributor
0x5810c486c231803578d0ae7b3de97991784be1.notes: Claim-by-proof reward distributor. 0x8b681820 claim path must remain REWARD_CLAIM, not phishing.

0xea64df3a17b5172bfaf0e4215660cdec22ee7d.name: BSC Merkle Distributor
0xea64df3a17b5172bfaf0e4215660cdec22ee7d.notes: Merkle claim distributor. 0x2f52ebb7 claim path must remain REWARD_CLAIM.

0x212102fc6d0ed9ee784b25404db02b22b1e6dc.name: BSC Stream Rewards Distributor
0x212102fc6d0ed9ee784b25404db02b22b1e6dc.notes: Streaming claim distributor. 0x379607f5 claim(uint256) path must remain REWARD_CLAIM.

0x00000000005bbb0ef59571e58418f9a4357b68.name: Pendle RouterV3
0x00000000005bbb0ef59571e58418f9a4357b68.notes: Diamond proxy router (EIP-2535). Same address on all chains via CREATE2. swapExactTokenForPt = SWAP (buy PT). swapExactPtForToken = SWAP (sell PT / redeem). addLiquiditySingleToken / addLiquidityDualTokenAndPt = LP_MINT (yield LP). removeLiquiditySingleToken / removeLiquidityDualTokenAndPt = LP_BURN. IMPORTANT: PT and YT are separate derivative tokens — PT buy ≠ STAKING_DEPOSIT; model as SWAP with derivative output.

0x0000000001e4ef00d069e71d6ba041b0a16f7e.name: Pendle RouterV4
0x0000000001e4ef00d069e71d6ba041b0a16f7e.notes: Successor to RouterV3; same Diamond proxy pattern. All RouterV3 semantics apply. Check tx.to to distinguish V3 vs V4 calls in history.

0x1a6fcc85557bc4fb7b534ed835a03ef056552d.name: Pendle MarketFactoryV3
0x1a6fcc85557bc4fb7b534ed835a03ef056552d.notes: Deploys Pendle market pools (SY/PT/YT triads). Factory txs themselves are LP_MINT market creation events, not user actions.

0x1b6d3e5da9004668e14ca39d1553e9a46fe842.name: Pendle Router (legacy)
0x1b6d3e5da9004668e14ca39d1553e9a46fe842.notes: Legacy pre-V3 router on Ethereum. Superseded by RouterV3. Still present in older transaction history.

0x1f721e2e82f6676fce4ea07a5958cf098d339e.name: Camelot V3 SwapRouter (Algebra)
0x1f721e2e82f6676fce4ea07a5958cf098d339e.notes: Camelot V3 uses Algebra Integral (concentrated liquidity, dynamic fees). exactInputSingle / exactInput = SWAP. Distinct from Camelot V2 Router (0xc873fecbd354f5a56e00e710b90ef4201db2448d).

0x00c7f3082833e796a5b3e4bd59f6642ff44dcd.name: Camelot V3 NonfungiblePositionManager (Algebra)
0x00c7f3082833e796a5b3e4bd59f6642ff44dcd.notes: NFT position manager for Camelot V3 concentrated liquidity pools. mint() = LP_MINT. decreaseLiquidity() + collect() = LP_BURN. collect() alone = LP_FEE_CLAIM (fees only, no principal withdrawal). increaseLiquidity() = LP_MINT (add to existing position). Same interface as Uniswap V3 NonfungiblePositionManager.

0x1a3c9b1d2f0529d97f2afc5136cc23e58f1fd3.name: Camelot V3 AlgebraFactory
0x1a3c9b1d2f0529d97f2afc5136cc23e58f1fd3.notes: Deploys Camelot V3 (Algebra) pools. Pool contracts emit Mint/Burn/Swap/Collect events.

0x807f4e281b7a3b324825c64ca53c69f0b418de.name: Uniswap V3 SwapRouter02 (Plasma)
0x807f4e281b7a3b324825c64ca53c69f0b418de.notes: Official address from Plasma ecosystem contracts docs

0x743e03cceb4af2efa3cc76838f6e8b50b63f18.name: Uniswap V3 NonfungiblePositionManager (Plasma)
0x743e03cceb4af2efa3cc76838f6e8b50b63f18.notes: Official address from Plasma ecosystem contracts docs. mint/burn/collect = LP lifecycle

0xcb2436774c3e191c85056d248ef4260ce5f27a.name: Uniswap V3 Factory (Plasma)
0xcb2436774c3e191c85056d248ef4260ce5f27a.notes: Official address from Plasma ecosystem contracts docs

0x91716c4eda1fb55e84bf8b4c7085f84285c190.name: Fluid DexFactory (Plasma)
0x91716c4eda1fb55e84bf8b4c7085f84285c190.notes: Fluid DEX on Plasma. DexFactory deploys isolated pools. Fluid also has lending (LendingFactory).

0x52aa899454998be5b000ad077a46bbe360f4e4.name: Fluid Liquidity Layer (Plasma)
0x52aa899454998be5b000ad077a46bbe360f4e4.notes: Core Fluid liquidity layer — supply/borrow routing. Official from Plasma docs.

0xff5cb29241f002ffed2eaa224e3e996d24a6e8.name: Curve Router (Plasma)
0xff5cb29241f002ffed2eaa224e3e996d24a6e8.notes: Official Curve Router NG on Plasma from plasma.to ecosystem contracts

0x663dc15d3c1ac63ff12e45ab68fea3f0a883c2.name: deBridge DeBridgeRouter (Plasma)
0x663dc15d3c1ac63ff12e45ab68fea3f0a883c2.notes: Official deBridge router on Plasma. Note: different address from other chains (0x43de... is Ethereum/others).

0xef4fb24ad0916217251f553c0596f8edc630eb.name: deBridge DlnSource (Plasma)
0xef4fb24ad0916217251f553c0596f8edc630eb.notes: DLN = Decentralized Liquidity Network, deBridge's fast bridge variant

0x6100e367285b01f48d07953803a2d8dca5d198.name: WETH9 (Plasma / CCIP)
0x6100e367285b01f48d07953803a2d8dca5d198.notes: WETH on Plasma. Note: Plasma's native token is XPL (not ETH). WETH here is bridged ERC-20. ETH↔WETH basis rule still applies for the WETH token itself.

0x4bf659ca398a73aaf73818f0c64c838b9e229c.name: FusionX V3 Smart Router
0x4bf659ca398a73aaf73818f0c64c838b9e229c.notes: Smart Router (aggregates V2+V3 routes). Preferred entrypoint for FusionX swaps.

0x5752f085206ab87d8a5ef6166779658add4557.name: FusionX V3 NonfungiblePositionManager
0x5752f085206ab87d8a5ef6166779658add4557.notes: NFT LP positions. mint/decreaseLiquidity/collect = LP lifecycle. Interface identical to Uniswap V3 NonfungiblePositionManager.

0xeaee7ee68874218c3558b40063c42b82d3e723.name: Merchant Moe MoeRouter (Classic AMM)
0xeaee7ee68874218c3558b40063c42b82d3e723.notes: Classic AMM router (V2-style). Official from docs.merchantmoe.com/resources/contracts

0x013e138ef6008ae5fdfde29700e3f2bc61d21e.name: Merchant Moe LB Router 2.2 (Liquidity Book)
0x013e138ef6008ae5fdfde29700e3f2bc61d21e.notes: Liquidity Book router (TraderJoe-style discretized liquidity). LP positions are ERC-1155 bins, not NFTs. LP_MINT = addLiquidity; LP_BURN = removeLiquidity.

0x45a62b090df48243f12a21897e7ed91863e2c8.name: Merchant Moe LFJ Aggregator Router
0x45a62b090df48243f12a21897e7ed91863e2c8.notes: Aggregator that routes across Classic AMM + LB pools. Official from Merchant Moe docs.

event_topics.description: Keccak256 topic0 hashes for key DeFi events — use for log-based classification

erc20_transfer.event: Transfer(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 value)

uniswap_v2_swap.event: Swap(address indexed sender, uint amount0In, uint amount1In, uint amount0Out, uint amount1Out, address indexed to)

uniswap_v3_swap.event: Swap(address indexed sender, address indexed recipient, int256 amount0, int256 amount1, uint160 sqrtPriceX96, uint128 liquidity, int24 tick)

uniswap_v3_mint.event: Mint(address sender, address indexed owner, int24 indexed tickLower, int24 indexed tickUpper, uint128 amount, uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1)

uniswap_v3_burn.event: Burn(address indexed owner, int24 indexed tickLower, int24 indexed tickUpper, uint128 amount, uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1)

uniswap_v3_collect.event: Collect(address indexed owner, address recipient, int24 indexed tickLower, int24 indexed tickUpper, uint128 amount0, uint128 amount1)

aave_v3_supply.event: Supply(address indexed reserve, address user, address indexed onBehalfOf, uint256 amount, uint16 indexed referralCode)

aave_v3_withdraw.event: Withdraw(address indexed reserve, address indexed user, address indexed to, uint256 amount)

aave_v3_borrow.event: Borrow(address indexed reserve, address user, address indexed onBehalfOf, uint256 amount, uint8 interestRateMode, uint256 borrowRate, uint16 indexed referralCode)

aave_v3_repay.event: Repay(address indexed reserve, address indexed user, address indexed repayer, uint256 amount, bool useATokens)

balancer_swap.event: Swap(bytes32 indexed poolId, address indexed tokenIn, address indexed tokenOut, uint256 amountIn, uint256 amountOut)

lido_submitted.event: Submitted(address indexed sender, uint256 amount, address referral)

erc4626_deposit.event: Deposit(address indexed caller, address indexed owner, uint256 assets, uint256 shares)

erc4626_withdraw.event: Withdraw(address indexed caller, address indexed receiver, address indexed owner, uint256 assets, uint256 shares)

gmx_v1_swap.event: Swap(address account, address tokenIn, address tokenOut, uint256 amountIn, uint256 amountOut, uint256 amountOutAfterFees, uint256 feeBasisPoints)

gmx_v1_increase_position.event: IncreasePosition(bytes32 key, address account, address collateralToken, address indexToken, uint256 collateralDelta, uint256 sizeDelta, bool isLong, uint256 price, uint256 fee)

gmx_v1_decrease_position.event: DecreasePosition(bytes32 key, address account, address collateralToken, address indexToken, uint256 collateralDelta, uint256 sizeDelta, bool isLong, uint256 price, uint256 fee)

gmx_v2_order_created.event: OrderCreated(bytes32 key, Order.Props order) [approximate — verify from gmx-synthetics EventEmitter]

pendle_swap_pt_for_token.event: SwapPtAndToken(address indexed caller, address indexed market, address indexed token, int256 netPtToAccount, int256 netTokenToAccount, int256 netSyFeeFromMarket)

pendle_swap_yt_for_token.event: SwapYtAndToken(address indexed caller, address indexed market, address indexed token, int256 netYtToAccount, int256 netTokenToAccount)

pendle_add_liquidity.event: AddLiquidity(address indexed caller, address indexed market, address indexed receiver, uint256 netLpOut, uint256 netSyUsed, uint256 netPtUsed)

pendle_remove_liquidity.event: RemoveLiquidity(address indexed caller, address indexed market, address indexed receiver, uint256 netLpToRemove, uint256 netSyOut, uint256 netPtOut)

method_ids.description: 4-byte function selectors for common DeFi methods
method_ids.0x23b872dd: transferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 amount)

how_to_use: 2. If found: use event_type as primary classification with HIGH confidence
3. If not found: use event_topics to detect event type from logs
4. If still uncertain: use method_ids from tx.input first 4 bytes
5. If all fail: classify as UNKNOWN_DEFI_PATTERN and add to review queue

confidence_levels.HIGH: Address verified from official docs or on-chain. Use directly.
confidence_levels.MEDIUM: Address inferred from secondary sources. Cross-check with logs before using.

known_gaps: Beefy/Yearn individual vault addresses — too many to enumerate; use ERC4626 detection
Hop Protocol full bridge address matrix (per token per chain) — partial coverage
Old Across V1 SpokePool addresses — superseded by V2 above
notes.update_process: When encountering UNKNOWN_DEFI_PATTERN: 1) identify contract via Etherscan/Blockscout label 2) add entry here 3) re-run classification
